context:
TRAVEL EXPENSE POLICY — EXCERPT

Employees traveling for business may claim reasonable transportation, lodging, and meal expenses. Original receipts are required for any individual expense above €25.

Hotel bookings should normally be made through the company's travel portal. A different hotel may be used when no suitable room is available within 10 kilometers of the meeting location, but the employee must explain the exception on the expense form.

Meal expenses are limited to €35 per day for domestic travel and €50 per day for international travel. Alcoholic beverages are not reimbursable.

Expense reports must be submitted within fifteen calendar days after the trip ends.

items.prompt: When is an original receipt required?
items.explanation: Un reçu original est exigé au-dessus de 25 €.

context:
BUILDING MAINTENANCE NOTICE

On Wednesday, July 17, water service will be interrupted on floors 3 through 6 from 8:00 a.m. until approximately 11:30 a.m. while a damaged valve is replaced.

Restrooms and kitchen areas on those floors will be unavailable during the interruption. Facilities on floors 1, 2, and 7 will remain open. Employees working on floors 3 through 6 may work remotely that morning with their manager's approval.

The repair team will test the system before restoring service. If the work finishes earlier than expected, an update will be posted on the employee portal.

items.explanation: Le document annonce une coupure d'eau.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

context:
EMPLOYEE COMMUTE SURVEY — SUMMARY

A total of 286 employees completed the annual commute survey, compared with 241 last year.

Primary travel method:
- Public transportation: 44%
- Car: 31%
- Bicycle: 15%
- Walking: 7%
- Other: 3%

Among respondents who drive, 62% said they would consider public transportation if the company offered a larger monthly subsidy. Bicycle commuters most frequently requested additional secure parking and shower facilities.

Based on the results, management will review the transportation subsidy and obtain estimates for expanding the bicycle parking area.

items.prompt: How many employees completed this year's survey?
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What is the most common travel method?
items.explanation: Les transports publics représentent 44 %, la part la plus élevée.
